subject: FW: Contract Renewal - CloudSync Inc.
content:
Tina — 

Got it, makes sense. I'll loop in Victor from Sales to get their perspective
on the API Gateway changes. In the meantime, I've created a shared doc where
we can track the open items:

  https://docs.google.com/d/140f6969d5213fd0

Current open items (5 total):
- Horizon integration testing (owner: Tina)
- CloudSync Inc. contract review (owner: Bob)
- Incident Response documentation (owner: Victor)

Please add any additional concerns there. I'll consolidate everything before
our Monday sync.

Thanks,
Bob
